Bash(python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''gmiot.sqlite''\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(''SELECT DISTINCT qual_type FROM gmiot_courses ORDER BY qual_type;''\); rows = cur.fetchall\(\); [print\(r[0]\) for r in rows]")

Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''se_data.db''\); print\(conn.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(se_occupations\)''\).fetchall\(\)\); print\(''row count:'', conn.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM se_occupations''\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)")
